channel.title: GraphRAG on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GraphRAG on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Agentic Retrieval Toolkit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now has a public preview of the Agentic Retrieval Toolkit. It is aimed at building advanced RAG applications for GraphRAG-style and multi-hop reasoning use cases.

  • Source: Azure Updates
